summary: A 2018-2019 DHS 'SeeSay Challenge' PSA: a host holds a 'How many times is...' cue card while people pass a yellow backpack around a college-style setting, an awareness/attention game asking viewers how observant they are, ending with a card directing to DHS.gov/TheChallenge. It is a narrated interactive informational PSA, not a music-driven spectacle or pop-culture genre experiment, and predates the second Trump administration. Out of scope.
notable_text: How many times is the yellow backpack passed? / How observant are you of your surroundings? Visit DHS.gov/TheChallenge to complete the challenge. / If you see something suspicious, say something to local authorities.
